description: My Business Lodging API is part of Google Business Profile and lets authorized users manage lodging-specific business information for locations on Google. It is exposed on the `mybusinesslodging.googleapis.com` service host.
summary: 1 HTTP API: My Business Lodging API at `https://mybusinesslodging.googleapis.com/v1`, authenticated with Google OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens using the Business Profile scope.
